analiza: Spain have looked more solid and better organised so far, especially at the back, and that gives them the edge in this matchup. Portugal can keep it competitive, but Spain still seem the more reliable side over 90 minutes. That makes the straight Spain win the cleanest angle here.

This looks like a very even game, but it also has the ingredients for goals rather than a slow, cautious battle. Both sides have enough attacking quality to create chances, and once the match opens up, the Over 2.5 line becomes very playable.
